reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the Jeep model that the Jeep Cherokee was originally sold as a variant of.
2. Using that model, determine the years it was produced and return that range.
original_final_question: The Jeep Cherokee was originally sold as a variant of a Jeep model produced during what years? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: The Jeep Cherokee was originally sold as a variant of which Jeep model? Evidence: Jeep Cherokee: Originally sold as a variant of the popular Jeep Wagoneer, the Cherokee has evolved from a full-size SUV to one of the first compact SUVs and eventually into its current incarnation as a crossover SUV. -> Jeep Wagoneer

Node 2: During what years was the Jeep Wagoneer sold and produced? Evidence: Jeep Wagoneer (SJ): The Jeep Wagoneer is the first luxury 4x4, sold and produced for Jeep through numerous marques from 1963 to 1991. -> 1963 to 1991
